description: Letter from Salāma b. Nissim b. Isḥāq al-Barqī, from Būṣīr, to Barhūn b. Ṣāliḥ al-Tāhartī, ca. 1053 (Gil). Contains a list of flax bales that Salāma had paid for arranged by the names of the growers, the quantities, and the prices that he had paid. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #642) VMR
